import io
import string
import list

fn remove_first(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut found = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    let val = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if found or val != target
      result = list.push(result, val)
    else
      found = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn k_largest(_ xs: List<Int>, _ k: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut count = 0
  while count < k and remaining.len() > 0
    let m = match list.max(remaining)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    result = list.push(result, m)
    remaining = remove_first(remaining, m)
    count = count + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end

  let k_raw = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    1
  end

  let result = k_largest(nums, k_raw)

  mut output = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < result.len()
    let val = match result.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if j == 0
      output = "#{val}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{val}"
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  println(output)
  Ok(())
end
